name: AIC4 — AI Cloud Service Compliance Criteria Catalogue
owner: Germany Federal Office for Information Security (BSI)
description: BSI's AI Cloud Service Compliance Criteria Catalogue (AIC4; official abbreviation AIC4, informally 'C4-AI' / 'C4' per BSI's workbook file naming) — attestation criteria for the security and trustworthiness of AI-based cloud services; the AI-specific companion to C5, attested under ISAE 3000. 40 audited criteria across 8 areas: Preliminary Criteria (PC), Security & Robustness (SR), Performance & Functionality (PF), Reliability (RE), Data Quality (DQ), Data Management (DM), Explainability (EX), and Bias (BI), plus a General Conditions series (BC-01…BC-06).
relationToCloudSecurity: Applies C5-style, ISAE 3000 attestation to AI services delivered via the cloud; complements the C5 catalogue for AI-specific requirements.
relationToAISecurity: Dedicated AI-security assurance catalogue covering robustness, performance, reliability, data quality/management, explainability, and bias for AI cloud services.

license.notes: Government publication; free download with BSI copyright retained. Generally permitted for reference and citation; consult BSI's terms before redistribution at scale.

notes: Enriched from auto-generated bulk metadata. Reclassified from regulation to control (AIC4 is an attestation criteria catalogue, not legislation).
